profile.name: Jesse Michels
profile.summary: Jesse Michels is the founder and host of American Alchemy, a YouTube channel with over 567,000 subscribers focused on UAP disclosure, fringe science, and interviews with high-profile insiders. His 2023 documentary-style interview with David Grusch - filmed before Grusch's congressional testimony - is widely credited as one of the first major media appearances to establish the whistleblower's public credibility. Michels has interviewed nearly every significant figure in the modern disclosure movement, making American Alchemy one of the most consequential independent journalism outlets in the UAP space.
early_career: Background in venture capital prior to pivoting to independent journalism
Built American Alchemy as a platform bridging mainstream finance/tech audiences with UAP research

key_events.event: Launched American Alchemy YouTube channel focusing on UAP and fringe science.
Interviewed Stanford scientist Garry Nolan on UAP materials analysis and neurological effects on experiencers.
Hosted landmark debate between Eric Weinstein and Hal Puthoff on UAP physics and government secrecy.
Released documentary interview with David Grusch - one of Grusch's first major media appearances before congressional testimony.
Released long-form documentary with Luis Elizondo covering AATIP, crash retrievals, and non-human intelligence.
Hosted Eric Weinstein and Eric Davis in multi-hour discussion on crash retrieval physics and program compartmentalization.

associated_people.name: David Grusch
associated_people.role: Former NRO/UAP Task Force officer, whistleblower
associated_people.relationship: Michels conducted one of Grusch's earliest and most comprehensive pre-testimony interviews in September 2023, helping establish his public credibility before the landmark congressional hearing.

associated_people.name: Luis Elizondo
associated_people.relationship: Subject of a documentary-length interview released October 2024 covering Elizondo's full arc from special operations through AATIP and public disclosure.

associated_people.name: Hal Puthoff
associated_people.relationship: Appeared in a February 2022 debate with Eric Weinstein on UAP physics; later solo interview on hidden technology arms race.

associated_people.name: Eric Davis
associated_people.relationship: Interviewed multiple times including a December 2024 solo session and a March 2026 multi-hour discussion alongside Eric Weinstein.

associated_people.name: Garry Nolan
associated_people.relationship: Early December 2021 interview on CIA engagement with UAP experiencers and anomalous isotope ratios in alleged crash materials.

associated_people.name: Ross Coulthart
associated_people.relationship: 2025 interview covering Coulthart's source network, the Bogota sphere phenomenon, and claims of Lockheed Martin holding alien craft.

associated_people.name: Daniel Sheehan
associated_people.relationship: August 2024 interview covering Sheehan's multi-decade involvement across Watergate, Pentagon Papers, Karen Silkwood, and UAP whistleblower representation.

disclosures.title: David Grusch Breaks Silence: Inside Secret UFO Programs
disclosures.notes: One of Grusch's first major media appearances. Michels conducted the interview before Grusch's July 2023 congressional testimony. Grusch detailed crash retrieval programs, non-human biologics recovery, and the Manhattan Project secrecy overlay on UAP programs.

disclosures.title: Multiple Alien Groups May Be Visiting Earth - Luis Elizondo Documentary
disclosures.notes: Long-form documentary covering Elizondo's full background in special operations, AATIP, crash retrieval programs, reverse engineering, and the esoteric dimensions of UAP phenomena.

disclosures.title: Eric Weinstein Debates CIA UFO Expert Hal Puthoff
disclosures.notes: Landmark debate on UAP physics, sequestered materials knowledge in aerospace corporations, and Puthoff's Stargate remote viewing program.

disclosures.title: Eric Weinstein Demands UFO Secrets From Pentagon Scientist
disclosures.notes: Eric Davis revealed crash retrieval program details including fewer than 40 total retrievals, more than 10 craft in US possession, and eight decades of failed reverse engineering.

disclosures.title: Eric Davis: A US President Was Briefed on UFOs
disclosures.notes: Davis discussed AAWSAP/AATIP briefings, harassment of Grusch after his whistleblower complaint, and George H.W. Bush's briefing on a 1960s UAP event during his CIA Director tenure.

disclosures.title: These Are Parts Of an Alien UFO - Stanford Scientist Garry Nolan
disclosures.notes: Nolan disclosed CIA recruitment to analyze UAP experiencers, neurological differences in their brains, and analysis of alleged crash material samples with anomalous isotope ratios.

interviews.overview: American Alchemy has conducted over 350 interviews since 2021. The curated set below focuses on guests with direct relevance to UAP disclosure, government programs, and key figures already documented in this platform.

catalog.title: Eric Weinstein Demands UFO Secrets From Pentagon Scientist
catalog.summary: Eric Davis details crash retrieval program scope, the absence of physicists in reverse engineering efforts, and eight decades of failed attempts to reproduce manufacturing processes of recovered craft.
notable_claims: Less than 40 total crash retrievals, more than 10 craft in US possession
The Roswell/Corona crash involved a craft of non-human origin
CIA DS&T was the portfolio owner of the crash retrieval program with Glen Gaffney involved

catalog.title: The Lone Hacker That Found NASA's Secret UFO Fleet
catalog.summary: British hacker who broke into 97 US military and NASA networks in 2000-2001 describes seeing a photograph of a cigar-shaped craft above Earth and a spreadsheet titled 'non-terrestrial officers'.
notable_claims: Found a spreadsheet at Johnson Space Center titled 'non-terrestrial officers' with names and ranks
NASA military networks had blank or trivial passwords in 2000
US authorities sought 70 years imprisonment

catalog.title: Army Captures Live Alien (Hospital Report Revealed)
catalog.summary: James Fox presents documentary investigation of the 1996 Varginha, Brazil incident including a neurosurgeon's claim of direct contact with a live alien being in a hospital ICU.
notable_claims: Neurosurgeon had direct telepathic communication with a live captured alien in a hospital ICU for 3-4 minutes
Military officer Marco Cherezi died from unknown bacteria after handling an alien being
Bacteria was unlike any known Earth species, completely resistant to antibiotics

catalog.title: I Located A UFO Base In Arizona (Ft. Ross Coulthart)
catalog.summary: Coulthart discusses Navy scientist Nat Kobitz being shown a non-terrestrial bulkhead at Wright Patterson AFB, Lockheed Martin holding alien spacecraft, and CIA blocking transfer to Bigelow Aerospace.
notable_claims: Nat Kobitz shown a piece of bulkhead at Wright Patterson bonded at the atomic level
US has recovered craft from Roswell, Aztec, and Kingman incidents
CIA prevented transfer of alien craft from Lockheed Martin to Bigelow Aerospace

catalog.title: They Have Craft - Hal Puthoff Exposes Hidden Tech Arms Race
catalog.summary: Puthoff describes a Washington meeting where officials revealed that the US, Russia, and China have all obtained crashed extraterrestrial craft and non-human bodies.

catalog.title: UFO Secrets Are Held By A Global Cabal (Ft. Steven Greer)
catalog.summary: Greer claims a transnational criminal organization controls advanced technologies including gravity control and free energy, and that most modern UFO sightings are man-made craft operated by human programs.

catalog.title: Eric Davis: A US President Was Briefed on UFOs
catalog.summary: Davis discusses AAWSAP/AATIP briefings to Congress, harassment of Grusch after his whistleblower complaint, and George H.W. Bush's classified briefing on a 1960s UAP event.
notable_claims: Grusch was physically harassed at his home and in his vehicles by unknown persons after filing whistleblower complaint
Someone illegally accessed Grusch's medical files and leaked his PTSD episode to media
George H.W. Bush was briefed on a major UAP event from the early 1960s during his CIA Director tenure

catalog.title: Multiple Alien Groups May Be Visiting Earth - Luis Elizondo Documentary
catalog.summary: Documentary-length interview covering Elizondo's full arc from special operations through AATIP, crash retrieval programs, reverse engineering, and esoteric dimensions of UAP phenomena.
notable_claims: American Legacy UAP reverse engineering programs exist
UAP are interested in nuclear and military capabilities
UAP are real and we are not alone

catalog.title: The Most Important UFO Investigator On The Planet (ft. James Fox)
catalog.summary: Fox discusses the 1996 Varginha crash, a classified parallel UFO program running alongside Blue Book, and the Robertson Panel's 1953 policy of systematically ridiculing UFO reports through media.
notable_claims: A classified document revealed a parallel well-funded UFO investigation running alongside Project Blue Book
The 1953 Robertson Panel adopted a classified policy of systematically ridiculing UFO reports through media

catalog.title: The Man Involved In Every American Conspiracy
catalog.summary: Sheehan covers his involvement across Watergate, Pentagon Papers, Karen Silkwood, and UAP whistleblower representation, and describes Congress ordering all military services and intelligence agencies to compile all UFO information.
notable_claims: Congress and the President ordered all six military services and 18 intelligence agencies to compile all UFO information by October 20, 2024

catalog.title: David Grusch Breaks Silence: Inside Secret UFO Programs
catalog.summary: One of Grusch's first major media appearances before his congressional testimony. Grusch details crash retrieval programs, non-human biologics recovery, and the Manhattan Project secrecy overlay on UAP programs.
notable_claims: Nearly 40 witnesses came forward to Grusch about covert UAP programs
Non-human biologics were recovered along with crashed craft
UAP show consistent interest in nuclear technology based on external observation

catalog.title: Whistleblower Dave Grusch: Oppenheimer's Involvement With UFOs
catalog.summary: Grusch explains how Manhattan Project secrecy protocols were overlaid onto UAP programs, the connection between the Atomic Energy Act and UAP classification, and Oppenheimer's receipt of early UAP reports.
notable_claims: The Schumer Amendment cites the McMahon Act of 1946 and references Department of Energy trans-classified nuclear information

catalog.title: Graham Hancock: Aliens, Atlantis and the Apocalypse
catalog.summary: Hancock presents his theory of a lost ancient civilization predating conventional history, the younger Dryas impact event, psychedelics and ancient religion, and the Ark of the Covenant's possible location.
notable_claims: The younger Dryas impact date aligns precisely with Plato's dates for the destruction of Atlantis
Francis Crick concluded DNA could not have evolved on Earth in the available time and proposed directed panspermia

catalog.title: Eric Weinstein Debates CIA UFO Expert Hal Puthoff
catalog.summary: Debate on UAP physics, sequestered materials knowledge in aerospace corporations, physics beyond general relativity, and Puthoff's 20-year Stargate remote viewing program.
notable_claims: Aerospace corporations have UAP materials knowledge sequestered against FOIA through proprietary labels, set up that way deliberately
Parts of the government consider wielding stigma as a tool for keeping programs secret to be their job
Stargate was a 20-year, $20 million program

catalog.title: These Are Parts Of an Alien UFO - Stanford Scientist Garry Nolan
catalog.summary: Nolan discloses CIA recruitment to analyze UAP experiencers, neurological differences in their brains in the caudate nucleus and putamen, and analysis of alleged crash material samples with anomalous isotope ratios.
notable_claims: The CIA came to Nolan's Stanford office to request analysis of people who claimed UFO contact
UFO experiencers showed increased neural density in caudate nucleus and putamen, also present in family members suggesting a genetic component
Alleged crash materials from Brazil showed isotope ratios that would have required a centrifuge to produce
